title: An Act making certain appropriations for fiscal year 2026 before final action on the General Appropriation Bill

abstracts.abstract: Message from Her Excellency the Governor submitting requests for making certain appropriations for fiscal year 2026 before final action on the General Appropriation Bill.

actions.description: Read; and referred to the committee on House Ways and Means

related_entities.name: the committee on House Ways and Means
committee on House Ways and Means

actions.description: Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
